name: IOVANCE BIOTHERAP.DL-,001
summary: Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing and commercializing cancer immunotherapies based on tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes (TIL). The company's TIL therapies are designed to harness the power of a patient's own immune system to eliminate cancer cells. Iovance is headquartered in San Carlos, California.
